title: Blister Packaging Line Clearance
text: Before starting blister packaging, perform line clearance. Verify absence of previous batch materials, labels, and components. Document clearance with electronic signature.

title: Material Identification at Packaging
text: Identify all primary and secondary packaging materials against the batch record. Scan or enter material numbers and verify batch numbers and expiry dates.

title: IPC Checks during Blister Packaging
text: Perform in-process control checks at defined intervals: seal integrity, print quality, and cavity count. Record results and escalate deviations.

title: Goods Movement after Packaging
text: Post packaging goods movement must reference the production order. Confirm quantity and target storage location before posting.

title: Electronic Signature for GMP Steps
text: GMP-relevant packaging steps require electronic signature with meaning of signature documented. No autonomous approval is permitted.
